title: FetchNodeInput
description: Input for core.openwop.http.fetch. `variables` substitute into the URL template; `body` is the request body when the method conventionally carries one.

variables.description: Substitution map for `config.url` template placeholders. Each `{{name}}` in the URL is replaced by the corresponding map value (URL-encoded). Missing keys → `INVALID_URL` at dispatch.

body.description: Request body for POST/PUT/PATCH. Objects/arrays are JSON-serialized with `Content-Type: application/json` (unless config.headers overrides). Strings are sent verbatim. null/undefined send no body.
